mapper.select: SELECT id, memory_type, summary, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, session_id, create_time, update_time, user_id FROM long_term_memory WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO long_term_memory (memory_type, summary, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, user_id, session_id, create_time, update_time,embedding_id) VALUES (#{memoryType}, #{summary}, #{memory}, #{memoryHash}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{sessionId}, datetime('now', 'localtime'), datetime('now', 'localtime'), #{embeddingId})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE long_term_memory SET memory_type = #{memoryType}, summary = #{summary}, memory = #{memory}, memory_hash = #{memoryHash}, parent_id = #{parentId}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime'), embedding_id = #{embeddingId} WHERE id = #{id}
